how_computed: Percentage of gold (endpoint x applicable variant) cases where the agent's observed actual_class equals the gold actual_class. A case the agent did not cover (no payload produced / not sent) counts as a mismatch. Denominator = applicable gold cases.
rationale: All four agents hit the same local API, so the raw rejection rate is a property of the API, not the agent. Fidelity-to-gold instead measures each framework's test quality: full matrix coverage, correct payload construction per variant, and faithful recording of the real status. The headline payload_rejection_rate_pct is still emitted by every agent as the task's QA finding.
